content-security-policy: default-src 'self' http: https: ws: wss:; connect-src 'self' http: https: ws: wss:; font-src 'self' http: https: data:; img-src 'self' http: https: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; frame-src https://bizonbizon.notion.site
